primaryObjective: A harness is the runtime shell that turns a raw model into a usable assistant or agent.

shots.visualFocus: harness metaphor with shared work packet and concept rail
acceptance: Frame is nonblank and uses the active concept accent.

The scene can be understood without voiceover.
